REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-14-2005 - CASE REPORTED SETTLED BY FAX LETTER FROM PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY. SUE KAPLAN, COMMISSIONER; D. CARTER, CLERK; NOT REPORTED.
